gt_sql: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, SUM(T2.cost) FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.member_id = 'rec4BLdZHS2Blfp4v'
pred_sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, SUM(e.cost) 
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE m.member_id = 'rec4BLdZHS2Blfp4v'
GROUP BY m.first_name, m.last_name;
